nasb.text: Of Levites there were Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah (that is, Kelita), Pethahiah, Judah and Eliezer.

esv.text: Of the Levites: Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah (that is, Kelita), Pethahiah, Judah, and Eliezer.

cnv.text: 利未人中有約撒拔、示每、基拉雅，還有毘他希雅、猶大和以利以謝。

ccb.text: 利未人中有约撒拔、示每、基拉雅——又名基利他、毗他希雅、犹大和以利以谢。
